column1: NMBAs — practical considerations before and during use?
column2:
Provide deep sedation prior to paralysis
Monitor depth of block (TOF / peripheral nerve stimulator)
Ensure airway control and ventilatory support
Regular eye care (absent blink reflex → corneal injury)
